# Receipt 2 meal

> Smart pantry tracker and AI-powered zero-waste meal planner. Track your fridge inventory, get personalized recipes based on expiring ingredients, and reduce food waste.

## What Receipt 2 Meal Does

Receipt 2 meal is a web application that helps households reduce food waste by tracking pantry inventory, monitoring expiry dates, and generating AI-powered meal plans that prioritize using ingredients before they spoil. Key features include:

- Pantry inventory management with automatic expiry tracking
- AI meal plan generation based on real-time pantry contents
- Smart restock suggestions based on cooking frequency
- Food waste analytics and sustainability metrics
- Dietary restriction and allergen management
- Receipt scanning for automatic ingredient import

## Content Resources

### Guides
- [Guides Hub](https://fridgechef.app/guides/): Browse all food storage and meal planning guides
- [Food Storage Guide](https://fridgechef.app/guides/food-storage-guide.html): Complete shelf-life reference for 50+ ingredients
- [How Long Do Eggs Last?](https://fridgechef.app/guides/how-long-do-eggs-last.html): Egg freshness, float test, and storage tips
- [How Long Does Chicken Last in the Fridge?](https://fridgechef.app/guides/how-long-does-chicken-last-in-fridge.html): Raw vs. cooked chicken shelf life and safety
- [How Long Does Spinach Last?](https://fridgechef.app/guides/how-long-does-spinach-last.html): Storage methods and spoilage signs
- [How to Keep Herbs Fresh](https://fridgechef.app/guides/how-to-keep-herbs-fresh.html): 3 methods for extending herb life by weeks
- [Meal Planning 101](https://fridgechef.app/guides/meal-planning-101.html): Beginner's guide to meal prep and saving money

### Recipes
- [Zero-Waste Recipes](https://fridgechef.app/recipes/): Creative recipes using expiring ingredients

### Tools
- [Tools Hub](https://fridgechef.app/tools/): Browse all free kitchen tools
- [Food Storage Calculator](https://fridgechef.app/tools/storage-calculator.html): Interactive tool to look up shelf-life for any ingredient

### Blog
- [How to Cut Food Waste in Half](https://fridgechef.app/blog/reduce-food-waste.html): Practical zero-waste kitchen habits

## Application
- [Receipt 2 meal App](https://fridgechef.app/): The main web application

## Data Sources
All food storage data is based on USDA Food Safety and Inspection Service guidelines, FDA food safety recommendations, and peer-reviewed food science research.
